title: Close
description: Winning a battle with single-digit HP remaining. The party is unsettled.

steps.text: The enemy fell over. So did, very nearly, the party. Everyone sat down at once. The word 'won' technically applied.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: Is this a victory? Technically a victory?

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: Technically, yes. The ledger records a win. The ledger does not record the margin.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: The ledger is missing half the story.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: The ledger is always missing half the story. That is the ledger's function.

steps.text: They did, in fact, rest. Not because it was time to rest, but because they could not persuade their legs to be anywhere else.
